extraction.one_line_summary: EGUIRE Ion Izagirre soloed to victory from a 15-rider breakaway after attacking with 50km remaining, GC riders finished together with no time gaps.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway took 90km to form despite constant attacks, indicating GC teams wanted aggressive selection before committing to chase.
Van der Poel attacked breakaway 50km out but was marked immediately by Jorgenson group, revealing reduced UAE firepower.
Ineos and Bahrain initiated chase when Pinot/Mas threatened GC positions, showing sub-5-minute gaps trigger team responses.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: attacking breakaway with 50km remaining but getting caught shows form decline from early Tour dominance
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: attacking from breakaway gap worried GC teams despite being minutes down, showing climbing resurgence
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: marked Van der Poel's attack immediately and finished third, UAE domestique showing unexpected breakaway finishing speed
